label: Product Catalog Service
description: Manages the product catalog. Provides gRPC APIs to list all products, get a product by ID, and search by name/description. Loads from local JSON or AlloyDB. Supports runtime catalog reloading via SIGUSR1.
responsibilities: Serve the complete product catalog via ListProducts
Look up individual products by ID
Search products by case-insensitive substring match
Load data from local JSON file or AlloyDB
Support runtime catalog reloading via Unix signals
